text: The first scene feels sterile and almost futuristic—bright, empty, and organized, yet marked by an eerie quietness. I sense anticipation, as if something is about to begin but hasn’t yet. Moving into the vibrant second scene, I feel curiosity and engagement. The colors, words, and displays about research and innovation invite me to reflect on how thought, creativity, and technology shape our world. Here I am surrounded by ideas, drawn to participate and to question what it means to coexist with intelligent machines. I feel more alive and intellectually stimulated here.
